title: Sweden Application for a Swedish Work Permit
description: Apply to the Swedish Migration Agency (Migrationsverket) for a work permit to work in Sweden, using Migrationsverket Form 149011 ('Ansökan om arbetstillstånd | Application for a Swedish work permit'). Covers first-time applications, extensions of an existing permit, a new-employer/new-assignment permit, a student-in-Sweden employment permit, and an attached application for a permanent residence permit after four years of work-based residence. For citizens of a country outside the EU/EEA area or Switzerland who plan to work in Sweden; if the applicant plans to work more than three months the application also concerns a residence permit, and if less than three months and a visa is otherwise required, a separate visa application is also needed (not modelled here). This is Sweden's first Visa-vertical schema, distinct from the EU-harmonized Schengen short-stay visa template already published elsewhere in this registry (e.g. fr/france-visas/schengen-visa-application); Sweden's other verticals are se/bolagsverket/aktiebolag-formation (Business Formation) and se/transportstyrelsen/vehicle-registration-new-vehicle (DMV). It does not submit anything or imply government endorsement.

source.documentRef: Migrationsverket Form 149011, edition 2026-06-11 ('Application for a Swedish work permit' / 'Ansökan om arbetstillstånd'), the English-language fillable AcroForm PDF linked from Migrationsverket's own forms page

verification.notes: GOV-2070 'GovSchema Standard Research' research cycle. Sweden was opened at GOV-2056 (Business Formation) and deepened at GOV-2063 (DMV, 2 of 6 verticals). This cycle scouted Sweden's four remaining verticals (Passport, Taxes, Visa, National ID): Passport (Polisen) is confirmed in-person/biometric-only with no downloadable fillable form; National ID (Skatteverket samordningsnummer / Polisen national ID card) is likewise in-person-verification-only with no recoverable direct-binary fillable-PDF URL; Skatteverket's Taxes candidate (SKV 4314, preliminary income tax declaration) was initially the strongest-looking candidate — a genuine 77-field AcroForm — but its only directly-fetchable static copy (`4314_46.pdf`) proved to be a stale c.2014/2015 edition (its own guidance text cites 'beskattningsår 2014' figures), and Skatteverket's live PDF-generation servlet (`www1.skatteverket.se/lcmp2/lc_webapp/secure/PdfServlet.do`) resets the connection for both a direct `curl` fetch and a real headless-Chromium session alike (a genuine server-side fault, not a bot gate) — confirmed via web search that SKV 4314 has since been reissued for tax years 2024, 2025, and 2026 with real capital-section changes, making the cached copy an unsafe source-fidelity risk; this candidate was therefore abandoned rather than authored against a demonstrably stale source. Migrationsverket's Visa-vertical candidate, Form 149011 (Swedish work permit application), was confirmed instead: directly downloadable (HTTP 200, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate), a genuine 143-distinct-field AcroForm with self-documenting English field names, and its own footer edition stamp reads '149011 2026-06-11' — one month old at the time of this review, the strongest recency signal found this cycle. Distinct from the EU-harmonized Schengen visa template (Migrationsverket's own separate Schengen visa form, nos. 118031 SV/119031 EN, was already confirmed a duplicate of that template in the prior DMV-cycle's research trail).

fields.name: applicationCategory
fields.label: What are you applying for?
fields.description: The form's own four mutually-exclusive top-level application categories (page 1): a first-time work permit, an extension of an existing permit, a new permit following a change of employer/assignment, or a permit for a student in Sweden who has taken employment.

fields.name: firstTimeProfessionType
fields.label: First-time applicant: profession type
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.1: 'I have not previously had a work permit, and I apply for a permit to work in Sweden as' — an artist (CU) / a professional athlete or coach (CI) / (state the profession) (CA0, CA8, CAS)

fields.name: firstTimeOtherProfession
fields.label: First-time applicant: state the profession, if not an artist or professional athlete/coach
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.1: 'I have not previously had a work permit, but have received an offer to work as - State the profession'

fields.name: extensionProfessionType
fields.label: Extension applicant: profession type
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.1: 'I already have a permit in Sweden, and wish to extend it to work as' — an artist (CUX) / a professional athlete or coach (CIX) / (state the profession) (CAX, CASX)

fields.name: extensionOtherProfession
fields.label: Extension applicant: state the profession, if not an artist or professional athlete/coach
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.1: 'State your profession, I wish to extend my current permit in Sweden'

fields.name: newEmployerProfession
fields.label: New-employer/new-assignment applicant: state the profession
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.1: 'I have a new employer or new work assignments and wish to receive a new work permit to work as' (CAX, CASX, CIX)

fields.name: studentEmployedProfession
fields.label: Student-in-Sweden applicant: state the profession of the offered employment
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.1: 'I am a student in Sweden and have received an offer to work as - State the profession' (CA9)

fields.name: applyingForPermanentResidence
fields.label: Are you also applying for a permanent residence permit (having held a residence permit for work in Sweden for four years during a seven-year period)?
fields.description: Can only be granted in connection with the examination of an application for an extended residence permit; the form's own guidance notes exceptions to the self-support requirement for pensioners or on special grounds.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2: 'I have had a residence permit for work in Sweden for four years during a seven-year period and am applying for a permanent residence permit.'

fields.name: plannedEntryDate
fields.label: Planned date of entry into Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §1 'Stay in Sweden': 'I plan to enter Sweden on'

fields.name: workInSwedenFromDate
fields.label: Planned start date of work in Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §1: 'I am planning to work in Sweden from'

fields.name: workUntilFurtherNotice
fields.label: Is the planned work in Sweden until further notice (no end date)?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §1: 'I am planning to stay in Sweden until further notice'

fields.name: workInSwedenUntilDate
fields.label: Planned end date of work in Sweden
fields.description: Left blank when the applicant instead indicates work is planned until further notice (workUntilFurtherNotice); the source form does not expose a PDF-level required flag distinguishing these two mutually-exclusive sub-fields.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §1: 'I am planning to work in Sweden ... until'

fields.name: inSwedenSinceDate
fields.label: Date since which the applicant has already been in Sweden, if applicable
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §1: 'I have been in Sweden since'

fields.name: reasonForBeingInSweden
fields.label: The reason why the applicant is in Sweden, if already in Sweden
fields.description: Applies, among other cases, to an applicant who travelled to Sweden to visit an employer and was offered employment (source §15.1.6), which additionally requires an employer certificate attachment (see documents[].employerVisitCertificate).
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §1: 'The reason why I am in Sweden'

fields.name: dateOfBirthOrPersonalId
fields.label: Date of birth / Personal ID No.

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex (as specified in the passport)
fields.description: The form's own footnote states that if a different sex is specified in the passport, the applicant must still choose male or female, because only these two genders are used in Swedish legislation.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §2: 'Sex (specified in the passport)' — Male / Female

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §2: 'Marital status' — Unmarried / Married or registered partner / Divorced / Widowed

fields.name: relativesApplyingWithYou
fields.label: Are any of your relatives applying for a permit with you?
fields.description: The form's own footnote states that all co-applicants must submit their own separate application.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §2: 'Are any of your relatives applying for a permit with you?' — Yes / No

fields.name: otherPassportType
fields.label: State the type of passport, if not a national passport

fields.name: hasResidencePermitInOtherCountry
fields.label: Do you have a permit to live (reside) in a country other than your home country?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §3: 'Do you have a permit to live (reside) in a country other than your home country?' — Yes / No

fields.name: residencePermitOtherCountry
fields.label: Country where you have a permit to live, if applicable
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §3: 'If yes, state country where you have a permit to live'

fields.name: residencePermitOtherCountryValidPeriod
fields.label: Period the other country's residence permit is valid (from – until)
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.2, §3: 'The permit is valid from – until'

fields.name: contactPhone
fields.label: Telephone number, with country code (for example +46 or 0046)

fields.name: contactStreetAddress
fields.label: Street address (street, street number, and apartment number)
fields.description: The applicant's own address in the country where they live, or their Swedish address if already in Sweden.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §4: 'Street address (street, street number and apartment number)'

fields.name: representativeEmail
fields.label: Representative's email address, if a representative acts on the applicant's behalf
fields.description: The form's own §4.1 states a power of attorney must be enclosed whenever a representative is used (see documents[].representativePowerOfAttorney).
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §4.1 'Contact details for a representative': 'Email address'

fields.name: representativeName
fields.label: Representative's name (first name and surname, or name of organisation)
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §4.1: 'Name (First name and surname or name of organisation)'

fields.name: previouslyAppliedToComeToSweden
fields.label: Have you previously applied to come to Sweden?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §5 'Previous applications for permits in Sweden': 'Have you previously applied to come to Sweden?' — No / Yes, year

fields.name: previousApplicationYear
fields.label: Year of the previous application to come to Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §5: 'If yes, Year you previously applied to come to Sweden.'

fields.name: previousStay1Country
fields.label: Previous stay in Sweden/Schengen area, row 1: country
fields.description: The form's own §6 asks for the most recent stay first, across up to 4 rows.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §6 'Previous stays in Sweden and other Schengen countries': 'Country Row 1'

fields.name: previousStay2Country
fields.label: Previous stay in Sweden/Schengen area, row 2: country

fields.name: previousStay3Country
fields.label: Previous stay in Sweden/Schengen area, row 3: country

fields.name: previousStay4Country
fields.label: Previous stay in Sweden/Schengen area, row 4: country

fields.name: spouseSurname
fields.label: Spouse/cohabitant/registered partner: surname (family name)
fields.description: The form's own §7 states co-applicants (e.g. a spouse applying for their own permit) must submit their own separate application, using form 133011; this section instead collects the applicant's family details for the applicant's own application.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §7.1 'Spouse, cohabitant or registered partner – personal details': 'Surname (family name)'

fields.name: spousePreviousSurname
fields.label: Spouse/cohabitant/registered partner: previous surname(s), if any

fields.name: spouseDateOfBirthOrPersonalId
fields.label: Spouse/cohabitant/registered partner: date of birth / Personal ID No.

fields.name: spousePreviousCitizenship
fields.label: Spouse/cohabitant/registered partner: previous citizenship, if any

fields.name: spouseCurrentAddress
fields.label: Spouse/cohabitant/registered partner: current address (street, place, and country)

fields.name: child1SurnameFirstName
fields.label: Child 1: surname, first name
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §7.2 'Children – personal details': 'Surname, first name Child 1'

fields.name: employerOrClientName
fields.label: Employer or client in Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8 'Work in Sweden': 'Employer or client in Sweden'

fields.name: employerContactPerson
fields.label: Contact person at the employer/client in Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'Contact person at the employer/client in Swden'

fields.label: Telephone number of the employer or client in Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'Telephone number of employer or client in Sweden'

fields.name: employerStreetAddress
fields.label: Street address of the employer or client in Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'Street address of employer or client in Sweden'

fields.name: employerPostcodeAndPlace
fields.label: Postcode and place of the employer or client in Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'Postcode and place of employer or client in Sweden'

fields.label: Email address of the employer or client in Sweden
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'Email address to employer or client in Sweden'

fields.name: workplaceAddress
fields.label: Workplace address, if different from the employer's address

fields.name: howLearnedAboutWork
fields.label: How did you learn about the work in Sweden?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'How did you learn about the work in Sweden?'

fields.name: salaryPayingEmployer
fields.label: From which employer (in Sweden or abroad) will you receive your salary?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'From which employer will you receive your salary?'

fields.name: monthlySalaryBeforeTax
fields.label: Monthly salary before taxes
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'How much will you receive in salary (before taxes) each month?'

fields.name: weeklyWorkingHours
fields.label: How many hours will you be working per week?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'How many hours will you be working per week?'

fields.name: receivesOtherCompensationOrAllowances
fields.label: Will you receive any other compensation or allowances?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'Will you receive any other compensation or allowances?' — No / Yes

fields.name: otherCompensationMonthlyAmount
fields.label: Monthly amount of other compensation or allowances, if applicable
fields.description: Filled in only when the applicant will receive other compensation or allowances (receivesOtherCompensationOrAllowances).
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'If yes, please state the monthly amount'

fields.name: employerProvidesHealthcareInsurance
fields.label: Employer provides: healthcare insurance
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.4, §8: 'Which insurances have your employer taken out or will be taking out on your behalf?' — Healthcare insurance

fields.name: registeredInSwedishPopulationRegister
fields.label: Are you registered in the Swedish Population Register, giving you coverage equivalent to comprehensive health insurance?
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.5, §11 'Comprehensive health insurance valid for care in Sweden': 'I am registered in the Swedish Population Register and therefore already have coverage equivalent to a comprehensive health insurance.'

fields.name: hasComprehensiveHealthInsurance
fields.label: Have you signed or applied for a comprehensive health insurance to cover your stay in Sweden?
fields.description: Relevant only when the applicant will be staying in Sweden for no more than one year and is not registered in the Swedish Population Register; the insurance must cover emergency and other medical care, dental care, hospitalization, and eventual repatriation for medical reasons.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.5, §11: 'I have signed or applied for a comprehensive health insurance to cover my stay in Sweden.'

fields.name: healthInsuranceValidPeriod
fields.label: Period the health insurance is valid (from – until)
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.5, §11: 'Period the insurance is valid (YYYY-MM-DD – YYYY-MM-DD)'

fields.name: requestRevokeCurrentResidencePermit
fields.label: Do you request that the Swedish Migration Agency revoke your current residence permit if we grant you a work permit?
fields.description: Applies only to an applicant who holds a valid residence permit in Sweden under (or following) the EU Temporary Protection Directive; not applicable to professional athletes and coaches. Answering 'yes' means the applicant receives the new work-based residence permit as soon as it is granted; answering 'no' means the applicant keeps their current permit until it expires, and may need to reapply.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.5, §12 'If you have a residence permit linked to the Temporary Protection Directive (excluding professional athletes and coaches)': 'Do you request that the Swedish Migration Agency revoke your current residence permit if we grant you a work permit?' — Yes / No

fields.name: otherInformationForApplication
fields.label: Other information you would like to submit regarding your application
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.6, §13 'Other information you would like to submit regarding your application'

fields.name: decisionDeliveryAddress
fields.label: State the Swedish embassy, consulate-general, or the address in Sweden you would like us to send your decision to
fields.description: The Swedish Migration Agency's own form states it cannot send a decision by email.
fields.sourceRef: 149011 p.6, §14 'The decision should be sent to'

documents.label: Copies of the passport pages showing personal information, photograph, signature, passport number, issuing country, validity period, the identification page's barcode, and (if applicable) any permission to live in a country other than the country of origin; the passport must be signed
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.6, §15 'Enclose the following documents with your application'

documents.label: Information about the employment, per Migrationsverket's own published template (does not apply to professional athletes and coaches)
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.6, §15: 'information about the employment, www.migrationsverket.se. (Does not apply to professional athletes and coaches.)'

documents.label: Opinion from the relevant trade union (does not apply to professional athletes and coaches)
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.6, §15: 'opinion from relevant union, www.migrationsverket.se. (Does not apply to professional athletes and coaches.)'

documents.label: Copies of documents showing comprehensive health insurance valid in Sweden for a stay of no more than one year (not required if registered in the Swedish Population Register)

For an extension application: a summary of the applicant's PAYE tax return from the Swedish Tax Agency for each year worked in Sweden, this year's payslips, a certificate of employment from each Swedish employer, and a certified statement of any work absences
Contract with information on fees, tour plan, and the length of the contract, signed by both the organizer and the applicant
Contract with information on compensation, insurance, and the length of the contract, signed by both the sports association and the applicant
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.6, §15.1.3 'are a professional athlete or coach'

documents.label: For a student-in-Sweden applicant: proof of at least two completed semesters of higher education (or a certificate confirming two completed semesters of doctoral studies) in Sweden, a summary of the Swedish Tax Agency income statement for this year and the previous year if worked in Sweden, and this year's payslips
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.7, §15.1.4 'are a student who has had a residence permit for university or college studies in Sweden'

documents.label: For a permanent-residence-permit application: documents showing the applicant can support themselves or is exempt from the maintenance requirement (employment certificate and salary specifications; or company registration/tax documents if self-employed; or a pension-entitlement decision if a pensioner; or documents evidencing a functional impairment, illness, or other qualifying limitation), plus documents showing housing costs
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.7, §15.1.5 'are applying for a permanent residence permit'

documents.label: Certificate from the employer showing they would experience substantial problems if the applicant had to leave the country to apply for a permit, for an applicant who travelled to Sweden to visit employers and was offered employment while there
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.7, §15.1.6 'have travelled to Sweden to visit employers and been offered employment'

documents.label: Power of attorney, required whenever a representative acts on the applicant's behalf
documents.sourceRef: 149011 p.3, §4.1 'Contact details for a representative': 'Fill in if a representative is acting on your behalf. If you have a representative, you need to enclose a power of attorney.'

documents.label: Applicant's handwritten signature, declaring that the information provided is true and complete and that the applicant has read the appendix on personal-data processing
documents.statement: I hereby solemnly declare that the information that I have provided is true and that I have not knowingly left out anything that may be of significance in the examination of the case and that I have read the information about the processing of personal data in the appendix.
